Software Engineer
Arendal, NOR, 4846
Research & Development Engineering
Posted 23 days ago
2 of 2

Software Engineer

Arendal, NOR, 4846
Apply Now
Find out how well you match with this job
Job Req ID
66038
Work Type
Hybrid
Department
Research & Development Engineering
Hiring Program
Other

At Eaton, we’re powering what matters  and that includes delivering advanced maritime safety systems. We are looking for a Software Engineer to join our team working on our critical solution used in demanding environments worldwide.

In this role, you will design, develop, and maintain software for CCTV systems using C# on the Microsoft .NET platform, contributing to both new product development and the enhancement of existing solutions.

.​

What you’ll do:

  • Develop, design, and maintain software for HERNIS FLEX Server and Client applications
  • Program CCTV software solutions using C#, .NET, and Microsoft Visual Studio
  • Develop and maintain unit and integration tests, including automated test systems
  • Design and implement tests for new software in line with approved specifications
  • Contribute to software architecture, design, and continuous improvement initiatives
  • Produce technical documentation, including user manuals and training materials, in accordance with company procedures
  • Perform software testing, debugging, and statistical code analysis
  • Provide technical support internally and externally, including contributing to effective technical solutions
  • Deliver training and support across departments on CCTV systems (operation, configuration, networking, cybersecurity)

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field
  • Proven experience in software development  using C#
  • Strong knowledge of Microsoft Visual Studio and .NET ecosystem
  • Experience with software testing methodologies, including unit and integration testing
  • Familiarity with automated testing frameworks and code analysis tools
  • Experience working in an Agile/Scrum environment is highly beneficial
  • Fluency in Norwegian and strong communication skills in English (written and spoken)

What we offer:

  • Opportunities to work on cutting-edge technology in safety-critical systems
  • A collaborative and inclusive work environment
  • Professional development and career growth opportunities
  • Competitive compensation and benefits

#LI-MM2

All positions may require participation in video and in-person interviews as part of the hiring process. All candidates will be evaluated based on job-related competencies, and all candidates’ privacy rights and data security will be protected in accordance with applicable laws. 

We are committed to ensuring equal employment opportunities for job applicants and employees. Our recruitment processes use balanced selection criteria and avoid unlawful discrimination against applicants on the basis of their age, colour, disability, marital status, national origin, gender, gender identity, genetic information, race or racial origin, religion, sexual orientation or any other status protected or required by law.

About Us
Eaton is an intelligent power management company dedicated to protecting the environment and improving the quality of life for people everywhere. We make products for the data center, utility, industrial, commercial and institutional, machine building, residential, aerospace and mobility markets. We are guided by our commitment to do business right, to operate sustainably and to help our customers manage power ─ today and well into the future. By capitalizing on the global growth trends of electrification and digitalization, we’re helping to solve the world’s most urgent power management challenges and building a more sustainable society for people today and generations to come.
Founded in 1911, Eaton has continuously evolved to meet the changing and expanding needs of our stakeholders. With revenues of $27.4 billion in 2025, the company serves customers in 180 countries. For more information, visit www.eaton.com. Follow us on LinkedIn.


Recent Awards: Honored to be recognized
  • 2018-2025 World's most admired companies, Forbes
  • 2016-2023 Best Place to work for LGBTQ Equality, HRC
  • 2023-2024 Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces, Newsweek
  • 2012-2025 World's Most Ethical Companies, Ethisphere

"positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Eaton is an intelligent power management company dedicated to protecting the environment and improving the quality of life for people everywhere. We make products for the data center, utility, industrial, commercial and institutional, machine building, residential, aerospace and mobility markets. We are guided by our commitment to do business right, to operate sustainably and to help our customers manage power \u2500 today and well into the future. By capitalizing on the global growth trends of electrification and digitalization, we\u2019re helping to solve the world\u2019s most urgent power management challenges and building a more sustainable society for people today and generations to come.</br> Founded in 1911, Eaton has continuously evolved to meet the changing and expanding needs of our stakeholders. With revenues of $27.4 billion in 2025, the company serves customers in 180 countries. For more information, visit <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a>. "android", "bing": "bing", "youtube": "youtube", "savedSearchNotification": "saved_search_notification", "jobcase": "jobcase", "office": "office", "eatonjobs": "eatonjobs", "brightnetwork": "brightnetwork", "careersquare": "careersquare", "rediff": "rediff", "duunitori": "duunitori", "apec": "apec", "oikotie": "oikotie", "ignite": "ignite", "GIjobs": "GIjobs", "Programmatic": "Programmatic", "InHerSight": "InHerSight", "inhersight": "InHerSight"}, "careerDashboardSourceTrackingMode": null, "useFreeTextReferrer": false, "lowPriorityReferrerSrc": []}, "overrides": [{"data": {"positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Eaton is an intelligent power management company dedicated to protecting the environment and improving the quality of life for people everywhere. We make products for the data center, utility, industrial, commercial and institutional, machine building, residential, aerospace and mobility markets. We are guided by our commitment to do business right, to operate sustainably and to help our customers manage power \u2500 today and well into the future. By capitalizing on the global growth trends of electrification and digitalization, we\u2019re helping to solve the world\u2019s most urgent power management challenges and building a more sustainable society for people today and generations to come.</br> Founded in 1911, Eaton has continuously evolved to meet the changing and expanding needs of our stakeholders. With revenues of $27.4 billion in 2025, the company serves customers in 180 countries. For more information, visit <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a>. Follow us on LinkedIn.</div><br><br></center>", "title": "About Us"}, {"body": "<center><table class=\"awardMobile\"><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2018-2025 World's most admired companies, Forbes</li><li>2016-2023 Best Place to work for LGBTQ Equality, HRC</li><li>2020-2023 \"Top Employer\" in Mexico</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2023-2024 Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces, Newsweek</li><li>2012-2025 World's Most Ethical Companies, Ethisphere</li><li>\"Best LGBT Places to Work 2021\" in Mexico</li></ul></td></tr></table><br></center>", "title": "Recent Awards: Honored to be recognized"}, {"body": "<center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join' target='#'>Join Talent Community</a></div></center>", "title": "Not ready to apply yet?"}]}}}}, "conditions": [{"key": "position_department", "value": ["MX"]}]}, {"data": {"positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Eaton is an intelligent power management company dedicated to protecting the environment and improving the quality of life for people everywhere. With revenues of $27.4 billion in 2025, the company serves customers in 180 countries. For more information, visit <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a>. href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/careers/equal-opportunity-employer/privacy-policy.html' target='_blank'>\u6570\u636e\u9690\u79c1\u653f\u7b56</a>"}, "positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>\u4f0a\u987f\u516c\u53f8\u662f\u4e00\u5bb6\u667a\u80fd\u52a8\u529b\u7ba1\u7406\u516c\u53f8\uff0c\u81f4\u529b\u4e8e\u4fdd\u62a4\u73af\u5883\u548c\u6539\u5584\u4eba\u7c7b\u7684\u751f\u6d3b\u54c1\u8d28\u3002\u6211\u4eec\u7684\u4ea7\u54c1\u670d\u52a1\u4e8e\u6570\u636e\u4e2d\u5fc3\u3001\u516c\u7528\u4e8b\u4e1a\u3001\u5de5\u4e1a\u3001\u5546\u4e1a\u4e0e\u673a\u6784\u3001\u673a\u68b0\u5236\u9020\u3001\u4f4f\u5b85\u3001\u5b87\u822a\u548c\u8f66\u8f86\u5e02\u573a\u3002\u65e0\u8bba\u662f\u73b0\u5728\u8fd8\u662f\u672a\u6765\uff0c\u6211\u4eec\u627f\u8bfa\u6b63\u5f53\u7ecf\u8425\u3001\u53ef\u6301\u7eed\u8fd0\u8425\u548c\u5e2e\u52a9\u5ba2\u6237\u66f4\u597d\u5730\u7ba1\u7406\u52a8\u529b\u3002\u5728\u5168\u7403\u7535\u6c14\u5316\u548c\u6570\u5b57\u5316\u53d1\u5c55\u8d8b\u52bf\u7684\u52a9\u529b\u4e0b\uff0c\u6211\u4eec\u6b63\u5728\u5e2e\u52a9\u5ba2\u6237\u89e3\u51b3\u6700\u7d27\u8feb\u7684\u52a8\u529b\u7ba1\u7406\u6311\u6218\uff0c\u4e3a\u5f53\u4eca\u53ca\u672a\u6765\u7684\u4eba\u7c7b\u521b\u5efa\u66f4\u53ef\u6301\u7eed\u7684\u793e\u4f1a\u3002</br> \u81ea1911\u5e74\u6210\u7acb\u8d77\uff0c\u4f0a\u987f\u516c\u53f8\u4e0d\u65ad\u53d1\u5c55\uff0c\u4ee5\u6ee1\u8db3\u5229\u76ca\u76f8\u5173\u65b9\u65e5\u76ca\u53d8\u5316\u548c\u589e\u957f\u7684\u9700\u6c42\u30022025\u5e74\uff0c\u4f0a\u987f\u516c\u53f8\u5168\u7403\u9500\u552e\u989d\u7ea6274\u4ebf\u7f8e\u5143\uff0c\u4e1a\u52a1\u904d\u5e03180\u4e2a\u56fd\u5bb6\u548c\u5730\u533a\u3002\u5982\u9700\u66f4\u591a\u4fe1\u606f\uff0c\u656c\u8bf7\u8bbf\u95ee<a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a>\u6216\u5173\u6ce8\u4f0a\u987f\u516c\u53f8\u9886\u82f1\u8d26\u53f7\u3002</div><br><br></center>", "title": "\u5173\u4e8e\u6211\u4eec"}, {"body": "\u6211\u4eec\u4ee5\u613f\u666f\u4e3a\u52a8\u529b\u3001\u4ee5\u6218\u7565\u4e3a\u9a71\u52a8\u3001\u4ee5\u8fdc\u5927\u76ee\u6807\u4e3a\u6307\u5bfc\uff0c\u627f\u8bfa\"\u6b63\u5f53\u7ecf\u8425\"\u3002\u6211\u4eec\u76f8\u4fe1\u591a\u5143\u5316\u7ed9\u6211\u4eec\u5e26\u6765\u4f18\u52bf\uff0c\u591a\u5143\u5316\u601d\u7ef4\u65b9\u5f0f\u63a8\u52a8\u6211\u4eec\u521b\u65b0\u548c\u589e\u957f\u3002\u5728\u7b2c\u4e8c\u4efd\u5e74\u5ea6\u5168\u7403\u5305\u5bb9\u6027\u4e0e\u591a\u5143\u5316\u900f\u660e\u5ea6\u62a5\u544a\u4e2d\uff0c\u6211\u4eec\u56de\u987e\u4e86\u5728\u65c5\u7a0b\u4e2d\u53d6\u5f97\u7684\u8fdb\u5c55\uff0c\u4ee5\u53ca\u5c1a\u5f85\u6211\u4eec\u5b8c\u6210\u7684\u5de5\u4f5c\u3002\u6211\u4eec\u5728\u6700\u65b0\u7684\u53ef\u6301\u7eed\u53d1\u5c55\u62a5\u544a\u4e2d\uff0c\u4ecb\u7ecd\u4e86\u5b9e\u73b0 2030 \u5e74\u53ef\u6301\u7eed\u53d1\u5c55\u76ee\u6807\u7684\u8fdb\u5c55\uff0c\u5176\u4e2d\u5305\u62ec\u57fa\u4e8e\u79d1\u5b66\u7684\u6e29\u5ba4\u6c14\u4f53\u51cf\u6392\u76ee\u6807\u4ee5\u53ca\u5230 2030 \u5e74\u5b9e\u73b0\u78b3\u4e2d\u548c\u7684\u627f\u8bfa\u3002<br><br><br><center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/inclusion-diversity.html' target='#'>\u9605\u8bfb\u6211\u4eec\u7684 2021 \u5e74\u5305\u5bb9\u6027\u4e0e\u591a\u5143\u5316\u900f\u660e\u5ea6\u62a5\u544a</a><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/sustainability.html' target='#'>\u9605\u8bfb\u6211\u4eec\u7684 2021 \u5e74\u53ef\u6301\u7eed\u53d1\u5c55\u62a5\u544a</a></div> </center>", "title": "\u6211\u4eec\u5bf9\u5305\u5bb9\u6027\u548c\u591a\u5143\u5316\u4ee5\u53ca\u53ef\u6301\u7eed\u53d1\u5c55\u7684\u627f\u8bfa"}, {"body": "<center><table class=\"awardMobile\"><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2018-2025 \u5168\u7403\u6700\u53d7\u94a6\u4f69\u7684\u516c\u53f8\uff0c\u798f\u5e03\u65af</li><li>2016-2023 LGBTQ \u5e73\u7b49\u6700\u4f73\u5de5\u4f5c\u573a\u6240\uff0cHRC</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2023-2024 \u5168\u7403\u6700\u53d7\u559c\u7231\u5de5\u4f5c\u573a\u6240100\u5f3a\uff0c\u65b0\u95fb\u5468\u520a</li><li>2012-2025 \u5168\u7403\u6700\u5177\u9053\u5fb7\u516c\u53f8\uff0cEthisphere</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2022\u5e74\u4e2d\u56fd\u6700\u5065\u5eb7\u5de5\u4f5c\u573a\u6240\uff0c\u7f8e\u4e16\u798f\u5229</li><li>2022\u5e74\u82cf\u5dde\u6700\u4f73\u96c7\u4e3b</li><li>2022\u5e74\u82cf\u5dde\u5458\u5de5\u6700\u559c\u7231\u96c7\u4e3b</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2022\u5e74\u4e0a\u6d77\u6700\u4f73\u96c7\u4e3b\uff0c\u667a\u8054\u62db\u8058</li><li>2021\u5e74\u4e0a\u6d77\u6700\u4f73\u96c7\u4e3b\uff0c\u667a\u8054\u62db\u8058</li></ul></td></tr></table></center>", "title": "\u8fd1\u671f\u83b7\u5956\uff1a\u4eab\u53d7\u8363\u8a89\uff0c\u83b7\u5f97\u8ba4\u53ef"}, {"body": "<center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join' target='#'>\u52a0\u5165\u4eba\u624d\u793e\u533a</a></div></center>", "title": "\u5c1a\u672a\u51c6\u5907\u597d\u7533\u8bf7\uff1f"}]}}}}, "conditions": [{"key": "language", "value": ["zh-cn"]}]}, {"data": {"branding": {"customPageSections": {"customNavbarConfig": {"html": "<nav class=\"navbar navbar-default\"> <div class=\"container-fluid\"> <!-- Brand and toggle get grouped for better mobile display --> <div class=\"navbar-header\"> <button type=\"button\" class=\"navbar-toggle collapsed\" data-toggle=\"collapse\" data-target=\"#bs-example-navbar-collapse-1\" aria-expanded=\"false\"> <span class=\"sr-only\">Toggle navigation</span> <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span> <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span> <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span> </button> <a class=\"navbar-brand\" href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers?domain=eaton.com\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"> <img src=\"{{eatonlogo}}\" alt=\"eightfold-logo\"> </a> </div> <!-- Collect the nav links, forms, and other content for toggling --> <div class=\"collapse navbar-collapse\" id=\"bs-example-navbar-collapse-1\"> <ul class=\"nav navbar-nav\"> <li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers?domain=eaton.com\" target=\"_blank\">{{k30}}</a></li> <li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join\" target=\"_blank\">{{k2}}</a></li> <li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/candidate/login?domain=eaton.com\" target=\"_blank\">{{k31}}</a></li> </ul> </div><!-- /.navbar-collapse --> </div><!-- /.container-fluid --> </nav>"}}, "privacyHtml": "Confirme se voc\u00ea concorda com a <a href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/careers/equal-opportunity-employer/privacy-policy.html' target='_blank'>Pol\u00edtica de Privacidade de Dados da Eaton</a>"}, "positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"title": "Sobre n\u00f3s", "body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>A Eaton \u00e9 uma empresa de gerenciamento inteligente de energia dedicada a proteger o meio ambiente e a melhorar a qualidade de vida das pessoas no mundo todo. Desenvolvemos produtos para os mercados de data center, concession\u00e1rias de energia, industrial, comercial, servi\u00e7os p\u00fablicos, constru\u00e7\u00e3o de m\u00e1quinas, residencial, aeroespacial e de mobilidade. Somos guiados pelo nosso compromisso de conduzir os neg\u00f3cios da forma correta, operar de maneira sustent\u00e1vel e ajudar nossos clientes a gerenciar a energia \u2014 hoje e no futuro. Ao capitalizar as tend\u00eancias globais de crescimento da electrifica\u00e7\u00e3o e da digitaliza\u00e7\u00e3o, estamos ajudando a resolver os desafios mais urgentes de gest\u00e3o de energia do mundo e a construir uma sociedade mais sustent\u00e1vel para as pessoas de hoje e para as pr\u00f3ximas gera\u00e7\u00f5es.</br> Fundada em 1911, a Eaton evoluiu continuamente para atender \u00e0s necessidades em constante mudan\u00e7a e expans\u00e3o de seus stakeholders. Com receitas de US$ 27,4 bilh\u00f5es em 2025, a empresa atende clientes em 180 pa\u00edses. Para mais informa\u00e7\u00f5es, visite <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a>. Siga-nos no LinkedIn.</div><br><br></center>"}, {"title": "Nosso compromisso com a inclus\u00e3o, a diversidade e a sustentabilidade", "body": "<center><div>Somos movidos por nossa vis\u00e3o, impulsionados pela estrat\u00e9gia, guiados por nossas metas ambiciosas e comprometidos em fazer neg\u00f3cios da maneira certa. Acreditamos que a diversidade \u00e9 nossa for\u00e7a e que o pensamento plural incentiva a inova\u00e7\u00e3o e o crescimento. Em nosso segundo relat\u00f3rio anual global de Transpar\u00eancia em inclus\u00e3o e diversidade, n\u00f3s olhamos para o progresso que fizemos at\u00e9 agora em nossa jornada e o trabalho que ainda precisa ser feito. Nosso \u00faltimo relat\u00f3rio de sustentabilidade apresenta nosso progresso em dire\u00e7\u00e3o \u00e0s metas de sustentabilidade para 2030, que incluem objetivos de redu\u00e7\u00e3o de gases de efeito estufa baseados na ci\u00eancia e nosso compromisso em nos tornarmos neutros em carbono at\u00e9 2030.<br><br><center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/inclusion-diversity.html' target='#'>Leia nosso relat\u00f3rio de Transpar\u00eancia em inclus\u00e3o e diversidade de 2021</a><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/sustainability.html' target='#'>Leia nosso relat\u00f3rio de sustentabilidade de 2021</a></div><br><br></center>"}, {"title": "Pr\u00eamios recentes: Honrados pelo reconhecimento", "body": "<center><table class=\"awardMobile\"><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>Empresas mais admiradas do mundo, Fortune, 2018-2025</li><li>Melhor lugar para trabalhar por igualdade LGBTQ, HRC, 2016-2023</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2023-2024 Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces, Newsweek</li><li>2012-2025 World's Most Ethical Companies, Ethisphere</li></ul></td></tr></table><br></center>"}, {"title": "Ainda n\u00e3o est\u00e1 pronto para se inscrever?", "body": "<center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join' target='#'>Junte-se \u00e0 comunidade de talentos</a></div></center>"}]}}}}, "conditions": [{"key": "language", "value": ["pt"]}]}, {"data": {"branding": {"customPageSections": {"customNavbarConfig": {"html": "<nav class=\"navbar navbar-default\">\n <div class=\"container-fluid\">\n <!-- Brand and toggle get grouped for better mobile display -->\n <div class=\"navbar-header\">\n <button type=\"button\" class=\"navbar-toggle collapsed\" data-toggle=\"collapse\" data-target=\"#bs-example-navbar-collapse-1\" aria-expanded=\"false\">\n <span class=\"sr-only\">Toggle navigation</span>\n <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span>\n <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span>\n <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span>\n </button>\n <a class=\"navbar-brand\" href=\"https://app.eightfold.ai/careers?domain=eaton.com\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">\n <img src=\"https://static.vscdn.net/images/careers/demo/eaton/1713812950::eatonlogofr\" alt=\"eightfold-logo\">\n </a>\n </div>\n <!-- Collect the nav links, forms, and other content for toggling -->\n <div class=\"collapse navbar-collapse\" id=\"bs-example-navbar-collapse-1\">\n <ul class=\"nav navbar-nav\"> \n<li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers?domain=eaton.com\" target=\"_blank\">Rechercher un emploi</a></li>\n <li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join\" target=\"_blank\">Rejoindre la communaut\u00e9 des talents</a></li>\n <li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/candidate/login?domain=eaton.com\" target=\"_blank\">S'inscrire</a></li><li><a href=\"https://jobs.eaton.com/jobs\" target=\"_blank\" title=\"Pendant la transition vers ce site d'offres d'emploi, il y a aura encore des postes vacants actifs sur notre ancienne plateforme. Vous pouvez les consulter et y postuler ici.\">Afficher tous les postes actifs sur l'ancienne plateforme</a></li> </ul>\n </div><!-- /.navbar-collapse -->\n </div><!-- /.container-fluid -->\n </nav>"}}, "privacyHtml": "Veuillez confirmer que vous acceptez la <a href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/careers/equal-opportunity-employer/privacy-policy.html', target='_blank'>politique de confidentialit\u00e9 des donn\u00e9es</a> d'Eaton.", "heroImageConfig": {"default": {"enable": true, "image": "https://static.vscdn.net/images/careers/demo/eaton/1713812950::eatonlogofr", "text": "", "deviceConfiguration": [{"minWidth": 0, "maxWidth": 600, "enable": false}]}}}, "positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"videos": {"items": ["https://www.youtube.com/embed/f_KDo7fQwno", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/zzFxDjwZKoY", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/gCTBe01iuC8", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/baa_aiJ4L7E", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/ZZGoyBjg-Sk", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/fdNcttTJ2c0", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/_roIzH0mbWs", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/48El6o_Dr_0"]}, "positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"title": "\u00c0 propos de nous", "body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Eaton est une soci\u00e9t\u00e9 de gestion intelligente de l\u2019\u00e9nergie qui se consacre \u00e0 la protection de l\u2019environnement et \u00e0 l\u2019am\u00e9lioration de la qualit\u00e9 de vie des gens partout dans le monde. Nous fabriquons des produits pour les march\u00e9s des centres de donn\u00e9es, des services publics, de l\u2019industrie, du commerce, des institutions, de la construction de machines, du r\u00e9sidentiel, de l\u2019a\u00e9rospatiale et de la mobilit\u00e9. Nous sommes guid\u00e9s par notre engagement \u00e0 bien faire nos affaires, \u00e0 exercer nos activit\u00e9s de mani\u00e8re durable et \u00e0 aider nos clients \u00e0 g\u00e9rer l\u2019\u00e9nergie, aujourd\u2019hui et \u00e0 l\u2019avenir. En capitalisant sur les tendances de croissance mondiales de l\u2019\u00e9lectrification et de la num\u00e9risation, nous aidons \u00e0 r\u00e9soudre les d\u00e9fis les plus urgents au monde en mati\u00e8re de gestion de l\u2019\u00e9nergie et \u00e0 construire une soci\u00e9t\u00e9 plus durable pour les personnes d\u2019aujourd\u2019hui et les g\u00e9n\u00e9rations \u00e0 venir.</br> Fond\u00e9e en 1911, Eaton n\u2019a cess\u00e9 d\u2019\u00e9voluer pour r\u00e9pondre aux besoins changeants et croissants de ses parties prenantes. Avec un chiffre d\u2019affaires de pr\u00e8s de 27,7 milliards de dollars en 2025, l\u2019entreprise sert des clients dans plus de 180 pays. Pour plus d\u2019informations, visitez <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a>. Suivez-nous sur LinkedIn.</div><br><br></center>"}, {"title": "Notre engagement envers l'inclusion, la diversit\u00e9 et le d\u00e9veloppement durable", "body": "<center><div>Nous sommes guid\u00e9s par notre vision, notre strat\u00e9gie, nos objectifs ambitieux et notre engagement \u00e0 la bonne conduite de nos affaires. Nous sommes convaincus que la diversit\u00e9 est notre force et qu'une pens\u00e9e \u00e9largie est le moteur de l'innovation et de la croissance. Dans notre deuxi\u00e8me rapport annuel sur l'inclusion dans le monde et la transparence dans la diversit\u00e9, nous retra\u00e7ons nos progr\u00e8s et ce qu'il reste encore \u00e0 accomplir. Notre dernier rapport sur le d\u00e9veloppement durable pr\u00e9sente l'avanc\u00e9e de nos objectifs de d\u00e9veloppement durable pour 2030, comprenant une r\u00e9duction des gaz \u00e0 effet de serre et la neutralit\u00e9 carbone d'ici 2030.<br><br><center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/inclusion-diversity.html' target='#'>Lire notre rapport 2021 sur la transparence dans l'inclusion et la diversit\u00e9</a><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/sustainability.html' target='#'>Lire notre rapport 2021 sur le d\u00e9veloppement durable</a></div><br><br></center>"}, {"title": "Derni\u00e8res r\u00e9compenses : Nous sommes honor\u00e9s de ces r\u00e9compenses", "body": "<center><table class=\"awardMobile\"><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>Entreprises les plus admir\u00e9es au monde de 2018 \u00e0 2025, Fortune</li><li>Meilleur lieu de travail pour l'\u00e9galit\u00e9 LGBTQ de 2016 \u00e0 2023, HRC</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2023-2024 Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces, Newsweek</li><li>2012-2025 Les entreprises les plus \u00e9thiques au monde, Ethisphere</li></ul></td></tr></table><br></center>"}, {"title": "Pas encore pr\u00eat(e) \u00e0 postuler ?", "body": "<center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join' target='#'>Rejoindre la communaut\u00e9 des talents</a></div></center>"}]}}}}, "conditions": [{"key": "language", "value": ["fr"]}]}, {"data": {"branding": {"customPageSections": {"customNavbarConfig": {"html": "<nav class=\"navbar navbar-default\">\n <div class=\"container-fluid\">\n <!-- Brand and toggle get grouped for better mobile display -->\n <div class=\"navbar-header\">\n <button type=\"button\" class=\"navbar-toggle collapsed\" data-toggle=\"collapse\" data-target=\"#bs-example-navbar-collapse-1\" aria-expanded=\"false\">\n <span class=\"sr-only\">Toggle navigation</span>\n <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span>\n <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span>\n <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span>\n </button>\n <a class=\"navbar-brand\" href=\"https://app.eightfold.ai/careers?domain=eaton.com\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">\n <img src=\"https://static.vscdn.net/images/careers/demo/eaton/1713796137::eatonfr\" alt=\"eightfold-logo\">\n </a>\n </div>\n <!-- Collect the nav links, forms, and other content for toggling -->\n <div class=\"collapse navbar-collapse\" id=\"bs-example-navbar-collapse-1\">\n <ul class=\"nav navbar-nav\"> \n<li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers?domain=eaton.com\" target=\"_blank\">Nach Stellen suchen</a></li>\n <li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join\" target=\"_blank\">Der Talent Community beitreten</a></li>\n <li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/candidate/login?domain=eaton.com\" target=\"_blank\">Anmelden</a></li><li><a href=\"https://jobs.eaton.com/jobs\" target=\"_blank\" title=\"W\u00e4hrend wir zur neuen Karriere-Website wechseln, befinden sich weiterhin aktive offene Stellen auf unserer alten Plattform. Hier k\u00f6nnen Sie sie ansehen und sich bewerben.\">Aktive Stellen auf alter Plattform anzeigen </a></li> </ul>\n </div><!-- /.navbar-collapse -->\n </div><!-- /.container-fluid -->\n </nav>"}}, "privacyHtml": "Bitte best\u00e4tigen Sie, dass Sie der <a href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/careers/equal-opportunity-employer/privacy-policy.html' target='_blank'>Datenschutzrichtlinie von Eaton</a> zustimmen."}, "positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Eaton ist ein Unternehmen f\u00fcr intelligentes Energiemanagement, das sich dem Schutz der Umwelt und der Verbesserung der Lebensqualit\u00e4t von Menschen auf der ganzen Welt verschrieben hat. Wir entwickeln Produkte f\u00fcr Rechenzentren, Versorgungsunternehmen, Industrie, den gewerblichen und institutionellen Bereich, Maschinenbau, Wohngeb\u00e4ude, Luft- und Raumfahrt und Mobilit\u00e4t. Wir lassen uns von unserem Engagement leiten, richtig und nachhaltig zu wirtschaften und unseren Kunden beim Energiemanagement zu helfen \u2013 heute und in Zukunft. Durch Fokussierung auf die globalen Wachstumstrends Elektrifizierung und Digitalisierung, tragen wir dazu bei, die dringendsten Herausforderungen des Energiemanagements zu l\u00f6sen und eine nachhaltigere Gesellschaft f\u00fcr die Menschen von heute und kommenden Generationen aufzubauen.</br> Eaton wurde 1911 gegr\u00fcndet und hat sich kontinuierlich weiterentwickelt, um den sich \u00e4ndernden und expandierenden Bed\u00fcrfnissen unserer Stakeholder gerecht zu werden. Mit einem Umsatz von 27.4 Milliarden US-Dollar im Jahr 2025 bedient das Unternehmen Kunden in mehr als 180 L\u00e4ndern. Weitere Informationen finden Sie unter <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>eaton.com</a>. Folgen Sie uns auf LinkedIn.</div><br><br></center>", "title": "\u00dcber uns"}, {"body": "Unser Antrieb ist unsere Vision, geleitet von unserer Strategie und unseren ideellen Zielen sowie unserem Engagement f\u00fcr verantwortliches Handeln. Wir sind davon \u00fcberzeugt, dass Vielfalt unsere St\u00e4rke ist und vielf\u00e4ltige Denkweisen Innovationen und Wachstum f\u00f6rdern. In unserem zweiten, j\u00e4hrlich erscheinenden Global Inclusion and Diversity Transparency Report betrachten wir unsere Fortschritte auf diesem Weg und die Arbeit, die noch vor uns liegt. Unser neuester Nachhaltigkeitsbericht beschreibt auch den Fortschritt in Bezug auf unsere Nachhaltigkeitsziele f\u00fcr 2030. Diese umfassen auf wissenschaftlichen Erkenntnissen basierende Ziele zur Reduzierung des Treibhausgasaussto\u00dfes und die Zielsetzung, bis 2030 klimaneutral zu werden.<br><br><br><center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/inclusion-diversity.html' target='#'>Lesen Sie unseren Transparenzbericht zu Integration & Vielfalt 2021</a><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/sustainability.html' target='#'>Lesen Sie unseren Nachhaltigkeitsbericht 2021</a></div> </center>", "title": "Unser Engagement f\u00fcr die Integration & Vielfalt und Nachhaltigkeit"}, {"body": "<center><table class=\"awardMobile\"><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2018-2025 Die weltweit am meisten bewunderten Unternehmen, Forbes</li><li>2016-2023 Bester Arbeitsplatz f\u00fcr LGBTQ-Gleichberechtigung, HRC</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2023-2024 Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces, Newsweek</li><li>2012-2025 Die ethischsten Unternehmen der Welt, Ethisphere</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>Einer der attraktivsten Arbeitgeber in Bonn, von Capital.de 2022</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>Die besten Arbeitgeber in Deutschland \u2013 Stern 2023</li></ul></td></tr></table><br></center>", "title": "Aktuelle Auszeichnungen: Die Anerkennung ist uns eine Ehre"}, {"body": "<center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join' target='#'>Der Talent Community beitreten</a></div></center>", "title": "Sie sind noch nicht bereit f\u00fcr die Bewerbung?"}]}}}}, "conditions": [{"key": "language", "value": ["de"]}]}, {"data": {"positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Eaton is an intelligent power management company dedicated to protecting the environment and improving the quality of life for people everywhere. We make products for the data center, utility, industrial, commercial and institutional, machine building, residential, aerospace and mobility markets. We are guided by our commitment to do business right, to operate sustainably and to help our customers manage power \u2500 today and well into the future. By capitalizing on the global growth trends of electrification and digitalization, we\u2019re helping to solve the world\u2019s most urgent power management challenges and building a more sustainable society for people today and generations to come.</br> Founded in 1911, Eaton has continuously evolved to meet the changing and expanding needs of our stakeholders. With revenues of $27.4 billion in 2025, the company serves customers in 180 countries. For more information, visit <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a>. Follow us on LinkedIn.</div><br><br></center>", "title": "About Us"}, {"body": "<center><table class=\"awardMobile\"><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2018-2025 World's most admired companies, Forbes</li><li>2016-2023 Best Place to work for LGBTQ Equality, HRC</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2023-2024 Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces, Newsweek</li><li>2012-2025 World's Most Ethical Companies, Ethisphere</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>One of the most attractive employers in Bonn by Capital.de 2022</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>Germany's Best Employers by Stern 2023</li></ul></td></tr></table><br></center>", "title": "Recent Awards: Honored to be recognized"}, {"body": "<center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join' target='#'>Join Talent Community</a></div></center>", "title": "Not ready to apply yet?"}]}}}}, "conditions": [{"key": "position_location", "value": ["DE"]}]}, {"data": {"branding": {"customPageSections": {"customNavbarConfig": {"html": "<nav class=\"navbar navbar-default\">\n <div class=\"container-fluid\">\n <!-- Brand and toggle get grouped for better mobile display -->\n <div class=\"navbar-header\">\n <button type=\"button\" class=\"navbar-toggle collapsed\" data-toggle=\"collapse\" data-target=\"#bs-example-navbar-collapse-1\" aria-expanded=\"false\">\n <span class=\"sr-only\">Toggle navigation</span>\n <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span>\n <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span>\n <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span>\n </button>\n <a class=\"navbar-brand\" href=\"https://app.eightfold.ai/careers?domain=eaton.com\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">\n <img src=\"https://static.vscdn.net/images/careers/demo/eaton/1713796137::eatonfr\" alt=\"eightfold-logo\">\n </a>\n </div>\n <!-- Collect the nav links, forms, and other content for toggling -->\n <div class=\"collapse navbar-collapse\" id=\"bs-example-navbar-collapse-1\">\n <ul class=\"nav navbar-nav\"> \n<li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers?domain=eaton.com\" target=\"_blank\">Buscar trabajos</a></li>\n <li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join\" target=\"_blank\">Unirse a la comunidad de talentos</a></li>\n <li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/candidate/login?domain=eaton.com\" target=\"_blank\">Ingresar</a></li><li><a href=\"https://jobs.eaton.com/jobs\" target=\"_blank\" title=\"A medida que hacemos la transici\u00f3n a este sitio de empleos, a\u00fan tenemos trabajos activos en nuestra plataforma antigua. Cons\u00faltelos y post\u00falese aqu\u00ed.\">Consultar todos los trabajos antiguos activos</a></li> </ul>\n </div><!-- /.navbar-collapse -->\n </div><!-- /.container-fluid -->\n </nav>"}}, "privacyHtml": "Confirme que acepta la <a href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/careers/equal-opportunity-employer/privacy-policy.html' target='_blank'>Pol\u00edtica de privacidad</a> de Eaton"}, "positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"title": "Acerca de nosotros", "body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Eaton es una empresa de gesti\u00f3n inteligente de energ\u00eda dedicada a proteger el medio ambiente y mejorar la calidad de vida de las personas en todo el mundo. Fabricamos productos para los mercados de centros de datos, servicios p\u00fablicos, industrial, comercial e institucional, construcci\u00f3n de maquinaria, residencial, aeroespacial y movilidad. Nos guiamos por nuestro compromiso de hacer los negocios correctamente, de operar de manera sustentable y de ayudar a nuestros clientes a administrar la energ\u00eda hoy, y en el futuro. Al capitalizar las tendencias de crecimiento global de electrificaci\u00f3n y digitalizaci\u00f3n, estamos ayudando a resolver los desaf\u00edos de administraci\u00f3n de energ\u00eda m\u00e1s urgentes del mundo y a construir una sociedad m\u00e1s sustentable para las personas de hoy, y las generaciones venideras.</br> Fundada en 1911, Eaton ha evolucionado continuamente para satisfacer las necesidades cambiantes y en expansi\u00f3n de nuestros grupos de inter\u00e9s. Con ingresos de $27,400 millones de d\u00f3lares en 2025, la empresa atiende a clientes en 180 pa\u00edses. Para obtener m\u00e1s informaci\u00f3n, visita <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a>. S\u00edguenos en LinkedIn.</div><br><br></center>"}, {"title": "Nuestro compromiso con la inclusi\u00f3n y diversidad y la sostenibilidad", "body": "<center><div>Nos impulsa nuestra visi\u00f3n, nos alienta la estrategia y nos orientan las metas a las que aspiramos y asumimos el compromiso de hacer bien los negocios. Creemos que la diversidad es nuestro fuerte y que el pensamiento diverso impulsa la innovaci\u00f3n y el crecimiento. En nuestro segundo informe de transparencia anual sobre inclusi\u00f3n y diversidad global, se puede ver el progreso que hemos realizado en nuestro camino y el trabajo que falta realizar. En nuestro \u00faltimo informe de sostenibilidad puede verse nuestro progreso en pos de los objetivos de sostenibilidad para 2030, que incluyen los objetivos de reducci\u00f3n de gas de efecto invernadero y nuestro compromiso de lograr operaciones con neutralidad de carbono antes del 2030.<br><br><center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/inclusion-diversity.html' target='#'>Lea nuestro informe de transparencia sobre inclusi\u00f3n y diversidad de 2021</a><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/sustainability.html' target='#'>Lea nuestro informe de sostenibilidad de 2021</a></div><br><br></center>"}, {"title": "Premios recientes: Estamos orgullosos de ser reconocidos", "body": "<center><table class=\"awardMobile\"><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>Empresas m\u00e1s admiradas del mundo para Fortune, 2018-2025</li><li>Mejor lugar laboral para la igualdad LGBTQ para HRC, 2016-2023</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2023-2024 Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces, Newsweek</li><li>2012-2025 Las empresas m\u00e1s \u00e9ticas del mundo para Ethisphere</li></ul></td></tr></table><br></center>"}, {"title": "\u00bfNo est\u00e1 listo para presentar la solicitud?", "body": "<center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join' target='#'>Unirse a la comunidad de talentos</a></div></center>"}]}}}}, class=\"icon-bar\"></span>\n <span class=\"icon-bar\"></span>\n </button>\n <a class=\"navbar-brand\" href=\"https://app.eightfold.ai/careers?domain=eaton.com\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">\n <img class=\"collapse navbar-collapse\" id=\"bs-example-navbar-collapse-1\">\n <ul class=\"nav navbar-nav\"> \n<li><a href=\"https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers?domain=eaton.com\" target=\"_blank\">Search view them and apply here\"></a></li> </ul>\n </div><!-- /.navbar-collapse -->\n </div><!-- /.container-fluid -->\n </nav>"}}, "privacyHtml": "Please confirm you agree to the Eaton <a href='https://www.eaton.com/us/en-us/company/careers/equal-opportunity-employer/privacy-policy.html', target='_blank'>Data Privacy Policy</a>"}}, "conditions": [{"key": "language", "value": ["en"]}]}, {"data": {"branding": {"heroImageConfig": {"default": {"enable": true, "image": "https://static.vscdn.net/images/careers/demo/eaton/1757099971::careersBannerFrenchCanadian", "text": "", "deviceConfiguration": [{"minWidth": 0, "maxWidth": 600, "enable": false}]}}}, "positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"videos": {}, "positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Eaton est une entreprise de gestion intelligente de l\u2019\u00e9nergie qui se consacre \u00e0 la protection de l\u2019environnement et \u00e0 l\u2019am\u00e9lioration de la qualit\u00e9 de vie des gens dans le monde entier. Nous fabriquons des produits destin\u00e9s aux march\u00e9s des centres de donn\u00e9es, des services publics, de l\u2019industrie, du commerce et de institutions, de la construction de m\u00e9canique, du r\u00e9sidentiel, de l\u2019a\u00e9rospatiale et de la mobilit\u00e9. Nous sommes guid\u00e9s par notre engagement \u00e0 bien faire des affaires, \u00e0 fonctionner de mani\u00e8re durable et \u00e0 aider nos clients \u00e0 g\u00e9rer leur \u00e9nergie, aujourd\u2019hui et \u00e0 l\u2019avenir. En tirant parti des tendances mondiales de croissance de l\u2019\u00e9lectrification et de la num\u00e9risation, nous contribuons \u00e0 r\u00e9soudre les d\u00e9fis mondiaux les plus urgents en mati\u00e8re de gestion de l\u2019\u00e9nergie et \u00e0 b\u00e2tir une soci\u00e9t\u00e9 plus durable pour les gens d\u2019aujourd\u2019hui et pour les g\u00e9n\u00e9rations \u00e0 venir.</br> Fond\u00e9e en 1911, Eaton \u00e9volue constamment pour r\u00e9pondre aux besoins changeants et croissants de ses clients. Avec un chiffre d\u2019affaires de 27,4 milliards de dollars en 2025, l\u2019entreprise sert des clients en 180 pays. Pour plus d\u2019informations, visitez <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>eaton.com</a>. Suivez-nous sur LinkedIn.</div><br><br></center>", "title": "\u00c0 propos de nous"}, {"body": "<center><table class=\"awardMobile\"><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2018-2025 Les entreprises les plus admir\u00e9es au monde, Forbes</li><li>2016-2023 Meilleur lieu de travail pour l'\u00e9galit\u00e9 LGBTQ, HRC</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2023-2024 Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces, Newsweek</li><li>2012-2025 Les entreprises les plus \u00e9thiques au monde, Ethisphere</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2024 Meilleurs employeurs au Canada pour la diversit\u00e9, Forbes</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2022 Prix des meilleurs employeurs au Canada, Forbes</li></ul></td></tr></table><br></center>", "title": "Prix r\u00e9cents : honor\u00e9 d'avoir \u00e9t\u00e9 reconnu(e)"}, {"body": "<center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join' target='#'>Joignez-vous \u00e0 notre communaut\u00e9 de talents</a></div></center>", "title": "Pas pr\u00eat \u00e0 postuler?"}]}}}}, "conditions": [{"key": "language", "value": ["fr-CA"]}]}, {"data": {"positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Eaton is an intelligent power management company dedicated to protecting the environment and improving the quality of life for people everywhere. We make products for the data center, utility, industrial, commercial and institutional, machine building, residential, aerospace and mobility markets. We are guided by our commitment to do business right, to operate sustainably and to help our customers manage power \u2500 today and well into the future. By capitalizing on the global growth trends of electrification and digitalization, we\u2019re helping to solve the world\u2019s most urgent power management challenges and building a more sustainable society for people today and generations to come.</br> Founded in 1911, Eaton has continuously evolved to meet the changing and expanding needs of our stakeholders. With revenues of $27.4 billion in 2025, the company serves customers in 180 countries. For more information, visit <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a>. Follow us on LinkedIn.</div><br><br></center>", "title": "About Us"}, {"body": "<center><table class=\"awardMobile\"><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2018-2025 World's most admired companies, Forbes</li><li>2016-2023 Best Place to work for LGBTQ Equality, HRC</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2023-2024 Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces, Newsweek</li><li>2012-2025 World's Most Ethical Companies, Ethisphere</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>One of the best Austrian Employers by Der Kurier 2021</li><li>Top Employer in Austria by Top Employers Institute 2022</li><li>Eaton Industries Austria has received the EqualitA Award in the category \"Effectiveness for Austria as a Business Location\" 2024</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>Top Arbeitgeber by Kununu & Statista - 5th time in a row 2024</li></ul></td></tr></table><br></center>", "title": "Recent Awards: Honored to be recognized"}, {"body": "<center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join' target='#'>Join Talent Community</a></div></center>", "title": "Not ready to apply yet?"}]}}}}, "conditions": [{"key": "position_location", "value": ["AT"]}]}, {"data": {"positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"videos": {"items": ["https://www.youtube.com/embed/f_KDo7fQwno", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/zzFxDjwZKoY", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/gCTBe01iuC8", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/baa_aiJ4L7E", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/sCMDamKrpJA"]}, "positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Eaton is an intelligent power management company dedicated to protecting the environment and improving the quality of life for people everywhere. We make products for the data center, utility, industrial, commercial and institutional, machine building, residential, aerospace and mobility markets. We are guided by our commitment to do business right, to operate sustainably and to help our customers manage power \u2500 today and well into the future. By capitalizing on the global growth trends of electrification and digitalization, we\u2019re helping to solve the world\u2019s most urgent power management challenges and building a more sustainable society for people today and generations to come.</br> Founded in 1911, Eaton has continuously evolved to meet the changing and expanding needs of our stakeholders. With revenues of $27.4 billion in 2025, the company serves customers in 180 countries. For more information, visit <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a>. Follow us on LinkedIn.</div><br><br></center>", "title": "About Us"}, {"body": "<center><table class=\"awardMobile\"><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2018-2025 World's most admired companies, Forbes</li><li>2016-2023 Best Place to work for LGBTQ Equality, HRC</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2023-2024 Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces, Newsweek</li><li>2012-2025 World's Most Ethical Companies, Ethisphere</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2020-2024 Silver Recognition on Investors in Diversity by Irish Centre for Diversity</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"></ul></td></tr></table><br></center>", "title": "Recent Awards: Honored to be recognized"}, {"body": "<center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join' target='#'>Join Talent Community</a></div></center>", "title": "Not ready to apply yet?"}]}}}}, "conditions": [{"key": "position_location", "value": ["IE"]}]}, {"data": {"positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"videos": {"items": ["https://www.youtube.com/embed/f_KDo7fQwno", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/zzFxDjwZKoY", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/gCTBe01iuC8", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/baa_aiJ4L7E", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/tVmgRGP9pmw", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/icjznKxMNDY"]}, "positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"title": "R\u00f3lunk", "body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Az Eaton intelligens energiagazd\u00e1lkod\u00e1si v\u00e1llalat, amely elk\u00f6telezett a k\u00f6rnyezet v\u00e9delme, valamint az emberek \u00e9letmin\u0151s\u00e9g\u00e9nek jav\u00edt\u00e1sa ir\u00e1nt vil\u00e1gszerte. Olyan term\u00e9keket k\u00edn\u00e1lunk, amelyek az adatk\u00f6zpontok, a k\u00f6zm\u0171vek, az ipari, kereskedelmi, int\u00e9zm\u00e9nyi \u00e9s g\u00e9pgy\u00e1rt\u00e1si, valamint a lakoss\u00e1gi, a rep\u00fcl\u0151g\u00e9pipari \u00e9s a mobilit\u00e1si piacok sz\u00e1m\u00e1ra ny\u00fajtanak megold\u00e1sokat. Elk\u00f6telezettek vagyunk a felel\u0151s \u00fczletvitel, a fenntarthat\u00f3 m\u0171k\u00f6d\u00e9s, valamint \u00fcgyfeleink energiagazd\u00e1lkod\u00e1s\u00e1nak t\u00e1mogat\u00e1sa ir\u00e1nt \u2013 ma \u00e9s a j\u00f6v\u0151ben egyar\u00e1nt. A villamos\u00edt\u00e1s \u00e9s a digitaliz\u00e1ci\u00f3 glob\u00e1lis n\u00f6veked\u00e9si trendjeire \u00e9p\u00edtve hozz\u00e1j\u00e1rulunk a vil\u00e1g legs\u00fcrget\u0151bb energiagazd\u00e1lkod\u00e1si kih\u00edv\u00e1sainak megold\u00e1s\u00e1hoz, \u00e9s egy fenntarthat\u00f3bb t\u00e1rsadalom megteremt\u00e9s\u00e9hez a mai \u00e9s az elk\u00f6vetkez\u0151 gener\u00e1ci\u00f3k sz\u00e1m\u00e1ra.</br> Az 1911-ben alap\u00edtott Eaton folyamatosan fejl\u0151dik, annak \u00e9rdek\u00e9ben, hogy megfeleljen \u00fcgyfelei v\u00e1ltoz\u00f3 \u00e9s b\u0151v\u00fcl\u0151 ig\u00e9nyeinek. A v\u00e1llalat 2025-ben 27,4 milli\u00e1rd doll\u00e1ros bev\u00e9telt \u00e9rt el, \u00e9s 180 orsz\u00e1gban szolg\u00e1lja ki \u00fcgyfeleit. Tov\u00e1bbi inform\u00e1ci\u00f3\u00e9rt l\u00e1togasson el a <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a> weboldalra, vagy k\u00f6vessen minket a LinkedInen.</div><br><br></center>"}]}}}}, "conditions": [{"key": "position_location", "value": ["HU"]}]}, {"data": {"positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"videos": {"items": ["https://www.youtube.com/embed/f_KDo7fQwno", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/baa_aiJ4L7E", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/gCTBe01iuC8", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/zzFxDjwZKoY", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/tSfycGg0Oow"]}, "positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Eaton je spole\u010dnost zab\u00fdvaj\u00edc\u00ed se inteligentn\u00edm \u0159\u00edzen\u00edm energie, jej\u00edm\u017e c\u00edlem je ochrana \u017eivotn\u00edho prost\u0159ed\u00ed a zlep\u0161ov\u00e1n\u00ed kvality \u017eivota lid\u00ed po cel\u00e9m sv\u011bt\u011b. Vyr\u00e1b\u00edme produkty pro datov\u00e1 centra, energetiku, pr\u016fmysl, komer\u010dn\u00ed sektor, instituce, stroj\u00edrenstv\u00ed, reziden\u010dn\u00ed v\u00fdstavbu, letectv\u00ed a pozemn\u00ed mobilitu. \u0158\u00edd\u00edme se z\u00e1vazkem podnikat spr\u00e1vn\u011b, fungovat udr\u017eiteln\u011b a pom\u00e1hat na\u0161im z\u00e1kazn\u00edk\u016fm efektivn\u011b \u0159\u00eddit energii \u2013 dnes i v budoucnu. Vyu\u017eit\u00edm glob\u00e1ln\u00edch r\u016fstov\u00fdch trend\u016f elektrifikace a digitalizace pom\u00e1h\u00e1me \u0159e\u0161it nejnal\u00e9hav\u011bj\u0161\u00ed v\u00fdzvy v oblasti \u0159\u00edzen\u00ed energie a budovat udr\u017eiteln\u011bj\u0161\u00ed spole\u010dnost pro sou\u010dasn\u00e9 i budouc\u00ed generace.</br> Spole\u010dnost Eaton byla zalo\u017eena v roce 1911 a neust\u00e1le se vyv\u00edj\u00ed, aby dok\u00e1zala reagovat na m\u011bn\u00edc\u00ed se a rostouc\u00ed pot\u0159eby na\u0161ich z\u00e1kazn\u00edk\u016f. S tr\u017ebami ve v\u00fd\u0161i 27,4 miliardy USD v roce 2025 obsluhuje z\u00e1kazn\u00edky ve 180 zem\u00edch sv\u011bta. Pro vice informac\u00ed nav\u0161tivte na\u0161e str\u00e1nky <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a>. Sledujte na n\u00e1s na LinkedIn.</div><br><br></center>", "title": "O n\u00e1s"}, {"body": "<center><table class=\"awardMobile\"><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2018-2025 World's most admired companies, Forbes</li><li>2016-2023 Best Place to work for LGBTQ Equality, HRC</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2023-2024 Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces, Newsweek</li><li>2012-2025 World's Most Ethical Companies, Ethisphere</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>Golden Certificate for I&D Strategy Implementation by Byznys pro spolecnost 2022</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"></ul></td></tr></table><br></center>", "title": "Recent Awards: Honored to be recognized"}, {"body": "<center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn'c>Join Talent Community</a></div></center>", "title": "Not ready to apply yet?"}]}}}}, "conditions": [{"key": "position_location", "value": ["CZ"]}]}, {"data": {"positionDetailsConfig": {"sectionsConfig": {"videos": {"items": ["https://www.youtube.com/embed/f_KDo7fQwno", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/zzFxDjwZKoY", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/gCTBe01iuC8", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/baa_aiJ4L7E", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/7Ryecip5B8k", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/ndJVdqs-rJo", "https://www.youtube.com/embed/3GPZ6MWRqj0"]}, "positionCustomContent": {"items": [{"body": "<div class='disclaimer'>Eaton strives to provide benefits and programs that are competitive and focused on employee well-being. These programs are offered across the United States and Puerto Rico, but specific programs and options available may depend on eligibility factors such as geographic locations, date of hire, employment type and the applicability of collective bargaining agreements.</div><br><br>", "title": ""}, {"body": "<center><div class='aboutEaton'>Eaton is an intelligent power management company dedicated to protecting the environment and improving the quality of life for people everywhere. We make products for the data center, utility, industrial, commercial and institutional, machine building, residential, aerospace and mobility markets. We are guided by our commitment to do business right, to operate sustainably and to help our customers manage power \u2500 today and well into the future. By capitalizing on the global growth trends of electrification and digitalization, we\u2019re helping to solve the world\u2019s most urgent power management challenges and building a more sustainable society for people today and generations to come.</br>Founded in 1911, Eaton has continuously evolved to meet the changing and expanding needs of our stakeholders. With revenues of nearly $27.4 billion in 2025, the company serves customers in more than 180 countries. For more information, visit <a href='https://www.eaton.com'>www.eaton.com</a>. Follow us on <a href='https://www.linkedin.com/company/eaton'>LinkedIn</a>.</div><br><br></center>", "title": "About Us"}, {"body": "<center><table class=\"awardMobile\"><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2018-2025 World's most admired companies, Forbes</li><li>2016-2023 Best Place to work for LGBTQ Equality, HRC</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>2023-2024 Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces, Newsweek</li><li>2012-2025 World's Most Ethical Companies, Ethisphere</li></ul></td></tr><tr><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>Great Place to Work Certified, US 2023-2024</li><li>2021-2023 Americas Most Loved Workplace, Newsweek</li><li>Best Employers for Women, Forbes US 2023</li><li>Americas Best Large Employers, Forbes 2023</li></ul></td><td><ul class=\"awardList\"><li>Top Veteran Friendly Company US Veterans Magazine 2023</li><li>Top Workplaces in Northeast Ohio 2022</li><li>Best of the Best Employer for Veterans 2022</li><li>2020-2022 Diversity Leaders</li></ul></td></tr></table><br></center>", "title": "Recent Awards: Honored to be recognized"}, {"body": "<center><div><a class='nav-btn btn btn-sm header-search-btn' href='https://eaton.eightfold.ai/careers/join' target='#'>Join Talent Community</a></div></center>", "title": "Not ready to apply yet?"}]}}}}, "conditions": [{"key": "position_location", "value": class='aboutEaton'>Eaton is an intelligent power management company dedicated to protecting the environment and improving the quality of life for people everywhere.
